response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack web development and software engineering but completely lacks the specialized hardware, SoC modeling, and AI accelerator optimization experience required for this Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Over 25 years of extensive software engineering experience across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
Demonstrated ability to build low-latency, high-performance applications using DLang and asynchronous I/O.
Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, meeting the baseline educational and tenure requirements.
concerns: No evidence of experience with System-on-Chip (SoC) or IP modeling.
Lacks expertise in hardware-software co-design and AI accelerator power-optimization trade-offs.
Missing required background in deep neural network (DNN) training, inference optimization, and GPU architecture.
